title: stachys humifusa
intro: Stachys humifusa, commonly known as Wood Betony, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and supporting respiratory health. The herbal preparations of Wood Betony include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant.
